title: User Datagram Protocol (UDP) Packet Transmission Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the simple, connectionless process of sending and receiving a UDP datagram, highlighting the lack of handshaking, sequencing, or error recovery.
elements: UDP Header (Source Port, Destination Port, Length, Checksum)
relationships: Sender passes data and port info to create UDP segment
UDP segment is encapsulated into an IP packet
IP packet is routed through the network
Receiver's IP layer delivers payload to UDP
UDP uses destination port to deliver data to application
